page_title: Master's in Applied Data Science | DSI
meta_description: Explore how UChicago's data science master's degree can develop you into a leader in the field by elevating your technical skillset.
all_text_markdown:
The University of Chicago’s MS in Applied Data Science program equips you with in-demand expertise and an unparalleled network of global alumni. Take the next step and start your application today.
Programs
Choose from full- and part-time options in our In-Person and Online programs. [Apply today!](https://apply-psd.uchicago.edu/apply)
[In-Person Program](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/education/masters-programs/ms-in-applied-data-science/in-person-program)
[Online Program](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/education/masters-programs/ms-in-applied-data-science/online-program)
[MBA/MS Program](https://www.chicagobooth.edu/mba/joint-degree/mba-ms-applied-data-science?sc_lang=en)
Apply Today!
The application for entry is open! Prospective Online and In-Person students can apply by June 23, 2026, for full- and part-time study for Autumn 2026 entry. Start your application [here](https://apply-psd.uchicago.edu/apply).
How to Apply
You have questions; we have answers. Whether you are just beginning your search or are ready to apply, we are here to help you take the next step.
Industry Leading Faculty
UChicago’s Master’s in Applied Data Science program recruits industry leaders from across the country. Meet our instructors and learn how they are shaping the landscape of data science.
Data in Action - Capstone Projects
Whether you are early in your career or more advanced, you will benefit from our real-world Capstone Experience. You will have the opportunity to help top companies across multiple sectors to solve real business problems. [Sample Capstone Projects](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/capstone-projects).
How UChicago’s MS in Applied Data Science Prepares Future Innovators
Learn how the University of Chicago’s MS in Applied Data Science equips students with strong foundations in machine learning, real-world problem solving, and communication. Current students and alumni share how the curriculum prepares graduates to translate data into meaningful, real-world impact.
Start Your Application
The [application](https://apply-psd.uchicago.edu/apply)to be considered for Autumn 2026 enrollment is now open! The final application deadline for full- and part-time entrance in Autumn 2026 is June 23, 2026.
The [In-Person Program](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/education/masters-programs/in-person-program) and the [Online Program](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/education/masters-programs/online-program) admit full- and part-time students for entrance in the autumn quarter.
Related News, Insights, and Past Events
University of Chicago Announces Partnership with AI Research Commons and Microsoft to Accelerate Midwest AI Startups
University of Chicago Wins Distinguished Laude Institute Moonshots Seed Grant
University of Chicago Data Science Institute Welcomes Millennium as New Industry Affiliate Partner
For Better Sleep, One MS-ADS Student Turned to Artificial Intelligence
From Chips to Agents: UChicago Watches NVIDIA’s Vision for the Next Era of AI
What If AI Scientists Could Talk to Each Other?
UChicago Researchers Build a Tool to Help Fix Peer Review
Madeleine Torcasso (UChicago): Schmidt AI in Science Speaker Series
Winter 2026 Capstone Showcase Highlights Innovative Data Science Projects
OpenAI Lunch & Learn: James Hairston, Global Head of Innovation Policy

content.text: Start Your Application

The [application](https://apply-psd.uchicago.edu/apply)to be considered for Autumn 2026 enrollment is now open! The final application deadline for full- and part-time entrance in Autumn 2026 is June 23, 2026.

The [In-Person Program](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/education/masters-programs/in-person-program) and the [Online Program](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/education/masters-programs/online-program) admit full- and part-time students for entrance in the autumn quarter.
